# Opticode Starter

> A production-grade Next.js starter for building web apps fast, with Supabase, Drizzle, shadcn/ui, and the Vercel AI Gateway.

This file helps AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) understand the site. Replace the content below with your own product's summary, key pages, and FAQs.

## About
Describe what your product does in 2-3 sentences. Lead with the outcome for the user.

## Key pages
- /: Home
- /login: Sign in / create an account
- /dashboard: Authenticated area

## Contact
Add your contact or support link here.
